pi_items.source: task.json metadata and README specification; this is the required name for the saved search to be created
task.json metadata; verified against seeded papers. All 8 ML papers in the library are from 2012-2020, making year_threshold=2010 correct for capturing papers from 2010 onwards
README specification mentions searching by 'Date' or 'Year' field. export_result.sh checks for date_keywords including 'date', 'year', 'dateadded', 'pubdate'

Verified by analyzing seed_library.py CLASSIC_PAPERS (10 papers from 1905-1960) and ML_PAPERS (8 papers from 2012-2020). A search for papers from 2010 onwards returns exactly the 8 ML papers: AlexNet(2012), GANs(2014), Deep Learning(2015), ResNet(2016), AlphaGo(2016), Transformer(2017), BERT(2019), GPT-3(2020)
Verified via web search: AlexNet(2012-NIPS), GANs(2014-NIPS), Deep Learning(2015-Nature), ResNet(2016-CVPR), AlphaGo(2016-Nature), Transformer(2017-NIPS), BERT(2019-NAACL), GPT-3(2020-NeurIPS)

pi_items.metadata_value: Real academic papers seeded into Zotero test environment
pi_items.verified_value: Real academic papers seeded into Zotero test environment via seed_library.py --mode all
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh calls 'python3 /workspace/scripts/seed_library.py --mode all' which loads papers from hardcoded lists in seed_library.py

privileged_info_summary: The task uses 18 real academic papers seeded into a test Zotero instance: 10 classic papers (1905-1960) and 8 landmark machine learning papers (2012-2020). The metadata correctly specifies that a saved search named 'Papers Since 2010' should find all 8 ML papers (AlexNet 2012, GANs 2014, Deep Learning 2015, ResNet 2016, AlphaGo 2016, Transformer 2017, BERT 2019, GPT-3 2020) by filtering on the date/year field with a threshold of 2010.
